abstract: Best practices for designing and implementing 20 most-used UI components. Covers component anatomy (parts/slots), 8 required states (default, hover, focus, active, disabled, error, loading, readonly), accessibility requirements (ARIA roles, keyboard navigation, focus management), and anti-patterns. Synthesizes guidance from 95+ design systems including Shopify Polaris, IBM Carbon, Material Design, Radix UI, shadcn/ui. Includes testing checklist for WCAG 2.1 AA compliance.
